code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
mut sum = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  mut b = 0
  if not is_end
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  let is_ws = is_end or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          sum = sum + v * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("result=#{sum}")
